title: Motion Sickness on the Ocean: 9 Herbal Tinctures for Sailors
description: Astragalus membranaceus tinctures are a natural remedy that may help alleviate motion sickness. This herb contains properties and constituents that can help calm the digestive system and reduce nausea. Astragalus membranaceus is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These compounds may help to regulate the body's response to motion and reduce the symptoms of motion sickness, such as dizziness and vomiting. If ...
